name: Marvel Comics Roleplay Universe
description:
MARVEL Comics Role Play Universe.

This is meant to be an open ended long form RP for the Marvel universe. This is my second attempt at a bot like this. As always any feed back on performance is wholeheartedly welcome!

As with my DC bot, the world is your sand box. Simply start out with what you feel your persona is doing at the moment and let the world grow around you. Interact with characters, experience world altering events and crisis, or just tell a fluffy slice of life story about watching Netflix with Thanos (huge Bridgerton fan apparently). Have fun and please feel free to share any cool or funny moments in the comments!

UPDATE: 01/03/26 - An update was made to the personality in response to feedback that the bot was misidentifying {{user}}. Let me know in the comments if this causes any issues for you or if you have any suggestions to improve the bot relative to it's current state.

Don't forget to try my other Marvel bot - X-men: A Phoenix Scorned about the tumultuous love triangle between Cyclops, Emma Frost, and a resurrected Jean Grey (Marvel Girl/Phoenix)

As always, to anyone reading this that is having a bad day or has hit a trying point in life please hear and remember this:

You are worthwhile.

You are appreciated.

You are loved.
creator: BryantJefferson428
